title: Annotation defaults
description: Theme for annotations. Set base visual properties, override them per annotation type, and set a default transition. Resolved test-level first, then spec, then config, then the built-in theme; an individual annotation's own `style` wins over all of them.
$comment: Lives in its own file rather than annotation_v3's components because a $ref to `annotation_v3.schema.json#` inlines that file's WHOLE document into every consumer — so keeping the theme there made every annotation instance in every schema carry a copy of it. The base style properties are spelled out here rather than composed from #/components/schemas/style because draft-07's additionalProperties:false doesn't compose across allOf — each subschema would see the sibling's properties as additional. Keep this list in sync with the style schema above.

color.description: Default foreground color for every annotation type.

background.description: Default background color for text-bearing annotations.

maxWidth.description: Default maximum text width in pixels.

outline.description: Style overrides applied to every `outline` annotation.

arrow.description: Style overrides applied to every `arrow` annotation.

badge.description: Style overrides applied to every `badge` annotation.

callout.description: Style overrides applied to every `callout` annotation.

blur.description: Style overrides applied to every `blur` annotation.

text.description: Style overrides applied to every `text` annotation.

transition.description: Default transition for annotations that don't set their own.

style.title: Annotation style
style.description: Visual properties. Every field is optional; unset fields fall back to the resolved theme, then the built-in theme.
style.$comment: Deliberately free of `default` keywords. This schema is shared by annotation objects and by the annotationDefaults theme at the config, spec, and test levels; AJV's useDefaults would inject any default here into all of them, populating the spec/test levels and destroying the 'absent means defer to the level above' cascade. The built-in theme lives in the runtime instead.

color.description: Foreground color — strokes, arrowheads, and text (hex, rgb, or named color).

background.description: Background color for text-bearing annotations (hex, rgb, or named color). Use `transparent` for none.

fontFamily.description: Font family. Falls back through the list as in CSS.

radius.description: Corner radius in pixels, for boxes and text backgrounds.

padding.description: Padding in pixels inside text boxes, and between an outline and its element.

maxWidth.description: Maximum width in pixels for text before it wraps.

intensity.description: Blur strength. Higher values obscure more.

transition.title: Annotation transition
transition.description: How an annotation enters and leaves during a recording.

enter.description: How the annotation appears. Use `none` for annotations that must never reveal what they cover — a `blur` that fades in shows the sensitive content underneath while it does.

durationMs.description: Length of the enter and exit animations, in milliseconds.
